name: Hammerspoon
description: Open-source macOS automation tool that bridges OS APIs into a Lua scripting engine for power-user workflows.

seo.title: Hammerspoon — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Hammerspoon: Open-source macOS automation tool that bridges OS APIs into a Lua scripting engine for power-user workflows.

when_to_use: Custom macOS automation using Lua for power-user workflows
Window management scripting integrated with macOS APIs
Hotkey-driven context switching between dev environments
Automated system actions triggered by application events
Personal productivity toolkit built with Hammerspoon Lua

review.verdict: The most powerful free macOS automation tool — if Lua and shell thinking dont scare you off.
review.best_for: macOS power users comfortable scripting bespoke system-level workflows
review.not_for: Users wanting polished GUIs or avoiding code entirely

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free/open-source — no commercial pricing, no HWM.
